plugins.name: sdlc-plugin
plugins.description: Bundled skills for the full Software Development Lifecycle — plan, build, ship, operate, maintain. From early idea sketching through repo bootstrap, task implementation, and post-implementation verification, plus helpers for status, audit, course-correction, backlog and production-error triage, peer PR review, per-feature release-readiness, AI-readiness audit of existing mature repos, opinionated ETC-driven architecture review, and dev-loop fixes.

plugins.name: content-plugin
plugins.description: Content tools — humanise AI-sounding prose and migrate Teams chats to Confluence pages.

plugins.name: design-system-aurora-plugin
plugins.description: Glass Aurora design system — ethereal glassmorphism, aurora gradients, neon glows, and a purple-cyan color scheme for consistent UI components.

plugins.name: executive-advisor-plugin
plugins.description: Business advisory skills for agents acting as executives and advisors — strategic audits, business-purpose alignment, and decision-making frameworks drawn from foundational management thinking.

plugins.name: marketing-plugin
plugins.description: Take any app to market on a small budget with heavy AI leverage — readiness, audience research, positioning, planning, asset prep, launch runbooks, metrics, and an ongoing growth engine, all driven by a per-app profile.
